author: Nichel1
title: Technology
content: I‘very had an hp envy for several years & I lovED how user friendly it was before the competition forced everyone to complicate things. For some reason my printed disconnects from my WiFi at least once a month. I usually have to delete the app, reinstall it, unplug the printer, then plug it back up and go through the (install a new printer) process every single time it jumps offline. I so want to buy a newer model, but I’m afraid it’s going to do the same thing. Life was so much easier when everything wasn’t controlled by cell phones 😞

author: vickytori
title: You Go Glen Coco
content:
I never write reviews, but hp - you genuinely nailed it with this app. A seamless printing experience. 

I had the app downloaded, printing and scanning the signed lease for my new apartment within minutes. It got even better when I was able to quickly share the document to my computer and landlord using airdrop and Gmail. The scan was gorgeous, crisp and high res. 

I used to be a smartphone photo or Apple preview (help!) document person, but this app makes me believe in printing, signing and scanning again.

author: M Kbear
title: Exhausting
content: For years it was great. Simple format. Easy to use. Functional. Then came the fancy updates which made a mess. The Mac app never works so I gave up & stuck to the iPhone app which, for the last two weeks, has eaten up more time & caused more frustration than printing, scanning and faxing should. Significantly decreases production. It won’t progress past the loading screen. Delete, reinstall, then it couldn’t find the preexisting printer. Delete, reinstall, then it says the printer doesn’t have scan function, which it does, when setting up a fax. I just scanned for a fax a few days ago after several attempts. Please stop adding unnecessary functions to this app (ads for added services/tools/printers etc) when the base functions aren’t consistently usable.

author: EbonyAngel1
title: HP Printers—2nd to None!
content: Today I installed my new HP Envy Photo 7260r. It was almost too easy. HP has been my choice for the last 15 to 20 years, and there is no way I’d change. (I also have an HP Envy 5660 that just won’t quit. I’ll be donating it soon.) I’ve tried/used several other brands over the years, but none comes close to the ease of using an HP.  As stated setup is amazingly easy. Scanning is a breeze; the print quality is outstanding. Saving a document to a pdf from the print options is truly my favorite feature. Remote access is fantastic. Customer service is EXCELLENT: agents are knowledgeable and exceed expectations every time. Thank you HP. You are the BEST!

author: jesjester
title: Expensive ink
content: Good printer but ink is expensive. Still learning how it works.

author: Dirk Digglery
title: Don’t buy an HP printer
content: Worst printers ever made. Scam. Broken.

author: Lovey&Thurston
title: HP Smart Tank7602r
content: Just installed it. I hate it. I hate the refill bottles, I hate that I have to remove my plain paper in order to print my 4x6 photos. For me opening up the paper drawer is not easy. My husband removed it easily.

author: Lee N7
title: Not smart at all
content: The app won’t allow you to print if it’s in the background, I.e. not the main window, which for an app made for mobile phones is crazy. If I’m printing a 64 page document I don’t want to stay on the hp app while it prints! I need to use my phone for other things. Please add background capabilities. Also the app has a hard time reading Google Drive folders for some reason. This app doesn’t seem very smart to me.

author: livngdedgrrrl
title: Real annoying
content: Set up was easy enough. The printer scanned & printed the test pages perfectly! But whenever I need to print anything there’s an issue and it doesn’t print.

author: ylimefiagle
title: Connecting to new internet
content: Not easy to connect to new internet on this device

author: Rosa-Di
title: Impossible
content: I have a macbook and it is impossible to connect it. I really dislike the hp printer

author: Camesha B
title: Great for dtf
content: Love it! Really bright colorful detail

author: Quarantine for
title: 最好的打印机
content: 简单方便快捷

author: kari Bueso
title: Very Good
content: The best

author: Fredyp jajaja
title: Amazing copier
content: I love this copier and the help HP has provided for the ultimate experience
